item.title: Third Post
item.description:
Reflection on failures

Unit-3 has changed me personally. From childhood I have been hearing that failures are part of life and they make us strong. Sometimes we need to hear them constantly, I need that most. I have committed mistakes during my last exam. I should not have done those things. This chapter not only talks about errors committed by mankind in the field of engineering which resulted in disasters, but teaches how those mistakes have created opputunities to come up better. Commiting mistakes, errors and failures  are essential to be better at something. At the same time being  conscious of where and what we are experimenting with is also important. Another important aspect that I learned in this chapter, which is not part of the unit, is co- ordination among the group and how vital it is. I can’t discuss the case study that I did but really something is there beyond it to share. From my gut feeling, grades are really not at all important in  life. Some units give you knowledge and some questions us. I was already regretting what I did , this chapter psychologically taught me something. I started questioning myself.

item.title: Unit2 Reflection
item.description: Next Tuesday, we had evening class, which was very close to my interest, Media, where we learned  how images are represented using the bits.In fact this is unit2.Black and white images are represented using two samples either 0 bit or 1 bit. On the other hand coloured image  is represented using the 256 samples. Gained in depthe knowledge about Pixels in both black-white  and coloured images. For the last six months I have been learning adobe premier pro.There I heard these terms like pixels, hue, white balance, colour grading, and frame transitions . I related all the topics to that. The vey next lab aim was to build a blog site using hugo, which  demanded comfort with working on the command line. To publish it we needed git hup pages.The procedure was quite complex, for first time lerners like me. After this class , we went on learnign about images  and video. We started with representation of images  and how videos are made. Explored  in deep concepts of underlying bits , then on to colour images. Most fascinating things we see on our screen come out with a lot of mathematics and logic. I really  found myself in hard times, while learning this, because understanding this required little matrices. I am from a non-mathematics background. On the other hand, the instructor has informed us that there will be an exam on these concepts.The exam had multiple topics , yet those all come under unit2. I really started the week before the exam, because I always had fear that I would be able to pass the exam?After classes, during my free time, with help of chat gtp I learnt many concepts of the chapter. I practiced the worksheets given during the labs, twice and thrice. I used  to pick up multiple problems similar to the ones dynamic programic. I used to solve and verify them.Ths is given me lot of confidence before the exams. On the day of the exam, surprisingly , I did not find a single question regarding image transformation (simple ideas).It does not mean that there were no questions on it.Yes, there were but those from the function topics.

item.title: Introduction
item.description: Hello, my name is sai. my blog will contain my reflection on classroom experience. This is my very first class in Becomeing reflective scientist course. We usually encounter many companies that always roll out new decisions, updates and rules. Sometimes they may be affirmative actions.These are not just restricted to private entities but also for governments. Decisions were made should not face black slash, after releasing into the public domains. They  can not be made arbitaritly. We have to build them from the existing data. Existing data could be raw data. In the first spot these data look clumsy, messy and may irritate us.This data has to be refined or filtered.Filtering the data should come as a result of what we are looking at. Often  we use mathematical concepts such as mean, mode and median to help make better decisions.  So far I learned  how to refine the raw data. There is one more aspect we need to be aware of while  scrolling through social media. Often News agencies, attemt trick us, while displaying the data. Thismatical equations.I thought I have to solve them. Then I learned that  using pre-existing codes I have to prin those equations. That I felt something that I have flet something this course is worth learning.  is what I learned in my first class.   My second class was more focused on hands -on experience.Class was divided into random groups, each group almost had four members. Before going into lab work,instructions were clearly mentioned  in the given documents, yet I used to be confused. Despite sharing  work within the group, I still used to take help from my groupmates. Our aim was, for that class, to become comfortable writing wikies.For this to achieve, we learned markdown, how to write headings of different sizes and placing the texts. Assigned topics were read on the weekend and made summary. In the next class, using markdown rules, we made wikies. In the next lab class, we learnt about Zettler, a software used to type scientific notations and  mathematical equations.There were two ways to prin them depending where we need them in our output.Initially I got nervous when  I saw mathematics.
